manifest.description.message: Inline math expression evaluator with unit conversions

result.copy_hint.description: Description shown on a math result row

settings.description.message: Evaluate math expressions directly in the input bar without sending them to the agent.

settings.precision.label.description: Label for the decimal-precision number input

settings.precision.description.message: Number of decimal places to display (-1 = auto, 0 = integer)

settings.auto_copy.label.description: Toggle: copy math result to clipboard on Enter

settings.auto_copy.description.message: Automatically copy the answer to clipboard when pressing Enter

settings.thousands.label.description: Toggle: format large numbers with thousands separators

settings.precision.error.message: Math precision must be between -1 and 15
settings.precision.error.description: Validation error when precision is out of range
